groupings.title: Find Your Carol
groupings.description: Six skills, run in sequence, that turn an honest look at who you are into a precise definition of your ideal customer — the one whose love transforms your marketing, sales, pricing, and product.

groupings.title: Customer Interviews
groupings.description: Six skills, run in sequence, that turn customer conversations into decisions you can defend — what to build, who for, what to charge, and how to say it.

groupings.title: Find Yourself
groupings.description: Two skills, run in sequence, that turn an honest look at who you are into the one or two decisive advantages you bet your whole strategy on.

groupings.title: Standalone skills
groupings.description: Self-contained skills that run on their own, outside any workshop sequence.
